message:
fix(runtime): resize_sla test calibration phase handling

Two tests failed because they didn't account for the calibration phase:

- jsonl_format: The 6th value (15.0) exceeded the conformal threshold
  (2.0) built from calibration values 10-14, triggering "alert" instead
  of "observe". Fix: use 12.0 (the mean) as the post-calibration value.

- voi_sampling_forced_sample_records_event: The first event entered
  calibration (min_calibration=5) and returned None instead of
  Some(AlertDecision). Fix: set min_calibration=0 to skip calibration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
